Recommended rev-1 functions:

- XIAO nRF52840 Plus module mounting
- Round Display HMI support
- logic power input and regulation
- connectorized sensors
- driver interface signals
- alarm output
- SWD and programming access

Recommended rev-1 non-goals:

- integrated 24 V / 6 A TEC power stage
- enclosure optimization before electronics architecture is stable
- polishing the UI stack before safe thermal control exists

## Board Notes For PCBWay

- include orientation notes for the XIAO module
- include antenna keepout note in assembly drawing
- state clearly whether the XIAO is customer-supplied or fab-sourced
- if the Round Display is part of the quoted assembly, include its orientation, mating strategy, and whether it is customer-installed or factory-installed
